title: Compliance Evidence Integrity Dataset Record
description: Schema for synthetic records used to study integrity failures in automated compliance evidence pipelines.

scenario_id.description: Stable identifier for the synthetic scenario.

evidence_type.description: Type of compliance evidence represented by the record.

source_system.description: Named source system used in the simulation.

provenance_metadata.description: Synthetic metadata describing source identifiers, transforms, or chain-of-custody context.

integrity_signal.description: High-level integrity state expected for the record.

anomaly_category.description: Primary anomaly label for the synthetic record.

detection_context.description: Short description of why the scenario should be reviewed.

reproduction_steps.description: Human-readable steps describing how the synthetic anomaly was created.

simulated.description: Indicates that the record is synthetic and not derived from real evidence.

contains_pii.description: Indicates that the record does not contain personal data.

notes.description: Additional constraints, caveats, or reviewer notes.
